name: laglig.se
purpose: Swedish legal-compliance SaaS: companies build and maintain law lists (laglistor), track compliance per law, get AI assistance grounded in the Swedish legal corpus, monitor law changes, run ISO-grade internal audits, and manage HR/employee compliance.
generatedBy: Claude Code architecture sweep (7 parallel subsystem explorers). Regenerate by re-running a full-codebase documentation pass; update this file when architecture changes.

stack.database: PostgreSQL on Supabase (Supavisor pooler) via Prisma 6; pgvector for embeddings; pg_trgm for fuzzy title match
stack.auth: Hybrid: Supabase Auth = credential store; NextAuth (JWT strategy, 30d) = session; Prisma mirrors users + membership
stack.ai: Vercel AI SDK v6 (@ai-sdk/anthropic + @ai-sdk/openai) + raw @anthropic-ai/sdk. Chat = Claude Sonnet 4.6 (gpt-4-turbo fallback via AI_CHAT_MODEL env). Embeddings = OpenAI text-embedding-3-small (1536d). Rerank = Cohere Rerank v4. Context prefixes = Claude Haiku.
stack.search: Elasticsearch (index laglig_documents, Swedish analyzer) with PostgreSQL ILIKE fallback
stack.cache: Upstash Redis (no-op fallback) + Next unstable_cache tags; in-memory JWT cache in middleware
stack.email: Resend + React Email templates in emails/
stack.hosting: Vercel (Fluid serverless, 27 cron jobs, Deploy Hook for sitemap rebuild); Sentry for errors; middleware in proxy.ts (Edge)
stack.pdf: puppeteer-core + @sparticuz/chromium-min (CHROMIUM_PACK_URL in prod; node-linker=hoisted; fragile — do not dismantle)
stack.styling: Tailwind + shadcn/Radix; Safiro font for titles/labels, GSF for content; Tiptap rich-text editor
stack.testing: Vitest (unit ~329 tests, integration vs staging DB) + Playwright e2e (~39 specs)

coreDomainSpine.description: The central object chain. LawListItem is the join between the per-tenant compliance world and the global legal catalog; nearly every workspace feature hangs off it.

routeGroups.purpose: Unauthenticated account flows; centered-card layout, client form islands (_*.tsx)
Programmatic SEO content pages (Epic 26). MDX from content/marketing/*, typed Zod frontmatter, generateStaticParams + dynamicParams=false, JSON-LD, ForceLightTheme

routes.note: legal-area hub; hard-coded display groups, renders only published slugs
route handler; 1200×630 OG images via next/og, landing-v3 palette

routeGroups.purpose: Free public legal database (SEO-indexed). MarketingShell chrome (NavbarV3 + FooterV3). Server-rendered from LegalDocument

routes.note: law reader; TOC client island, floating references; Legislation JSON-LD
per-law SEO landing; ISR revalidate=3600; 11K+ docs
EU catalogue → förordningar/direktiv → reader with linked Swedish laws

routeGroups.purpose: Authenticated SaaS app. Layout = enforcement hub: session → active-workspace cookie → getWorkspaceContextSafe() (billing gates) → WorkspaceShell + impersonation/paused/trial banners. force-dynamic

routes.note: 'Hem' chat-first dashboard (HemPage); ?changeId deep-link; first-run onboarding modal
compliance audit cycles (Epic 21): wizard, item assessment, findings, sealed PDF report (route handler, maxDuration 300)
in-app mirror of the public legal DB with add-to-law-list actions (rattskallor, lagar, foreskrifter, eu)
governing documents browser + Tiptap DocumentEditor (agent approval, ?view=approved)
activity log, client component, URL-driven filters + export
tabbed: members, workflow, company, billing; billing-gate bypass so conversion surface renders

routeGroups.purpose: Internal ops console, separate auth realm (getAdminSession, admin JWT via jose + ADMIN_EMAILS). AdminSidebar + AdminHeader chrome

routes.note: post-signup wizard: company info → activity questions → tier picker → confirm; + pending invitations
route handlers for Supabase/email auth callbacks

navigationShells.workspace: WorkspaceShell (components/layout/workspace-shell.tsx, client) = LeftSidebar (Platform: Hem, Assistent, Efterlevnad▸Laglistor/Krav/Ändringar/Mallar, Kontroller, Regelverk▸browse | Work: Uppgifter, Styrdokument, Filer, Aktivitetslogg, HR) + Header + RightSidebar/ChatModal (AI panel, auto-folded on /dashboard) + Breadcrumbs. State: useLayoutStore (Zustand) + WorkspaceProvider
navigationShells.admin: AdminSidebar + AdminHeader, plain shell, admin JWT gate

middleware.verifies: NextAuth JWT via getToken(NEXTAUTH_SECRET); in-memory verification cache 60s TTL
middleware.rateLimit: Upstash sliding window 300 req/min prod (500 dev) on public/auth routes only; skipped for authed app/API prefixes; 429 + X-RateLimit-* headers
middleware.note: Middleware gates on JWT presence only. Real workspace membership/role/billing enforcement lives in the (workspace) layout + lib/auth/workspace-context.ts (Prisma unavailable in Edge).

authAndPermissions.sessionFlow: Login → NextAuth CredentialsProvider → supabase.auth.signInWithPassword → upsert user in Prisma → JWT session (30d). Signup → supabase.auth.signUp with emailRedirectTo /auth/verify (invite-aware).
authAndPermissions.workspaceContext: lib/auth/workspace-context.ts — getWorkspaceContext(): user → active_workspace_id cookie → WorkspaceMember → role. React-cached + Redis (auth:context:{email}:{workspaceId}, 5min). Billing gates: assertNotPastDue / assertTrialNotExpired redirect to /settings?tab=billing. Errors: UNAUTHORIZED|NO_WORKSPACE|WORKSPACE_DELETED|ACCESS_DENIED|PAYMENT_PAST_DUE|TRIAL_EXPIRED.
authAndPermissions.permissions: lib/auth/permissions.ts — ~17 string-literal permissions (workspace:delete/billing/settings, members:*, lists:*, documents:*, tasks:edit, changes:acknowledge, employees:*, activity:view, ai:chat, read); hasPermission()/canX() helpers; lib/api/require-permission.ts guards API routes

billing.model: Stripe; one Customer per workspace; tiers TRIAL/SOLO/TEAM/ENTERPRISE (ENTERPRISE sales-led, not self-serve)
billing.quotas: lib/usage/limits.ts is SSOT: TRIAL/SOLO 1 user/3M AI tokens/1GB; TEAM 3 users/9M/5GB (+addon seat = +1 user +1.5M); ENTERPRISE unlimited/100GB. Soft warn at 80%, hard cap at 2× → HTTP 402 from chat (memory: 'draft_styrdokument failed' can be a 402 quota cap in disguise).
billing.webhook: app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts — idempotent via StripeWebhookEvent insert-before-mutate; handles checkout completed (tier activate + trial-pause recovery), subscription.updated (tier + Pattern-A usage reset in same transaction), deleted (PAUSED), payment_failed (3-day grace + email), payment_succeeded
billing.trials: lib/billing/trial-*.ts + expire-trials cron 00:30; trial_picked_tier drives effective limits

chat.note: the single AI entrypoint; streaming, agent tools, web search, prompt caching, rate limits 10/min user 50/min workspace, quota check pre-stream

serverActions.location: app/actions/*.ts (~55 'use server' modules) — the mutation/data layer behind workspace pages

domains.lawLists: document-list.ts (~25), legal-document-modal.ts, law-list-item-requirements.ts (kravpunkter + evidence), law-list-import.ts (Epic 24: createImport→parseImportFile→runMatching→commitImport→proposeGroupings), catalog-ingest-request.ts
domains.compliance: compliance-audit-cycle.ts, compliance-audit-item.ts, compliance-audit-report.ts (generateCycleReport), compliance-finding.ts (spawnTaskForFinding), change-assessment.ts, change-events.ts
domains.documents: documents.ts (~30: dual-version draft/approved lifecycle, review workflow, DOCX import), files.ts (~35: upload/extract/folders/links), template-adoption.ts, linked-artifacts.ts, prefetch-documents.ts, track-visit.ts
domains.workspace: workspace.ts, workspace-settings.ts, invitations.ts, workspace-activity.ts, workspace-requirements.ts, onboarding-modal.ts, company-profile.ts, seats.ts, usage.ts, notifications.ts
domains.admin: admin-auth.ts, admin-cron.ts (triggerJob), admin-impersonate.ts, admin-templates.ts (~17), admin-workspaces.ts, admin-document-lookup.ts

cronJobs.auth: All GET with Bearer CRON_SECRET; logged via lib/admin/job-logger → CronJobRun; registry lib/admin/job-registry.ts; manually triggerable via admin triggerJob

jobs.purpose: catch-up sync 300 newest SFS laws from Riksdagen (MAX_INSERTS_PER_RUN=20)
diff existing laws (48h systemdatum lookback), archive DocumentVersion, create ChangeEvent + Amendment

discovery ONLY (2026-07 split): crawl svenskforfattningssamling.se index, create PENDING AmendmentDocument incrementally per page; fetch timeouts + deadline guard; processing moved to process-sfs-amendments

drain PENDING/FAILED amendments via shared lib/sfs/amendment-processor (PDF -> Claude Sonnet -> SectionChange/ChangeEvent); atomic PROCESSING claims, per-record budget guard, LLM call timeout; maxDuration 800

watchdog: sweeps zombie RUNNING cron runs -> FAILED (hard kills never reach catch/email), compares official SFS register vs DB coverage, checks PENDING backlog age + last-success recency; alert email only when unhealthy
Skolverket SKOLFS API state-diff
self-healing RAG: chunk docs missing/stale chunks, embed NULL embeddings (BATCH_LIMIT=50)
extract text from uploaded WorkspaceFiles → RAG ingestion
reindex dirty workspace_documents past 60s debounce
AI summaries for amendments (Anthropic)
daily digest emails + in-app notifications for un-notified ChangeEvents
due-soon/overdue notifications
weekly task digest
retry failed SFS PDF fetches
warm browse + popular-document caches after sync
pipeline health + SFS gap detection email
trial expiration enforcement
expire PENDING agent action proposals (7d TTL)
expire invitations; hard-delete workspaces soft-deleted 30+ days
backstop reset of stale WorkspaceUsage (>35 days)
Vercel Deploy Hook rebuild for fresh sitemaps
monthly unit-economics → WorkspaceCost
weekly founder margin email
AI change-event summaries; triggered via admin

dataModel.schema: prisma/schema.prisma (~2764 lines, 65 models, 57 enums, snake_case @@map, 74 migrations). RLS enabled default-deny on all tables with no policies (Prisma connects as postgres BYPASSRLS) — protects against leaked anon key.

models: Workspace (tenant root: slug, org_number, tier, status, Stripe fields, trial fields, law_list_generation_*, first-run cols, soft-delete)
CompanyProfile (1:1; SNI, activity_flags, certifications, BolagsAPI enrichment — feeds the AI)
LegalDocument (master row: content_type, document_number unique, html_content SSOT, markdown_content for RAG, search_vector tsvector, embedding vector(1536) unused for search, last_change_* SSOT)
ChangeEvent (the spine of notifications: NEW_LAW/AMENDMENT/REPEAL/METADATA_UPDATE/NEW_RULING/UPCOMING_AMENDMENT, ai_summary, notification_sent)

LawListItem (CENTRAL: unique(list,document), compliance_status EJ_PABORJAD/PAGAENDE/UPPFYLLD/EJ_UPPFYLLD/EJ_TILLAMPLIG, commentary/ai_commentary/business_context/compliance_narrative, source ONBOARDING/MANUAL/IMPORT/TEMPLATE, last_change_acknowledged_at)
WorkspaceFile (file/folder tree, Supabase storage_path, category BEVIS/POLICY/AVTAL/CERTIFIKAT/OVRIGT/CHAT_ATTACHMENT, extracted_text for RAG, extraction_status, sha256 dedupe)
WorkspaceDocument (styrdokument; DUAL-VERSION pointers current_approved + current_draft + draft_status; needs_reindex)
WorkspaceDocumentVersion (immutable; Tiptap JSON SSOT; source TIPTAP/IMPORT/AGENT)

ContentChunk (THE vector store: source_type LEGAL_DOCUMENT/USER_FILE/CONVERSATION/ASSESSMENT/WORKSPACE_DOCUMENT/COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENT, workspace_id null=global, contextual_header + context_prefix + content, embedding vector(1536) HNSW cosine m=16 ef_construction=64)
CatalogIngestRequest (ops queue for missing catalog docs)
Employee (Fortnox-mapped; personnummer + salary ENCRYPTED AES-256-GCM; employment_form Fortnox codes; personel_type TJM/ARB; manager self-ref)

libServices.agent: lib/agent — THE core AI module. retrieval.ts (2-stage RAG: pgvector HNSW over-fetch 4× → Cohere Rerank v4), system-prompt.ts (system-prompt.md + company/employee/skill context), context-assembly.ts, build-model-messages.ts, prompt-cache.ts (3 Anthropic ephemeral breakpoints), thinking-effort.ts (adaptive thinking), web-search-config.ts (Swedish legal domain whitelist), legal-ref-detector.ts, skill-loader (build-time manifest; skills: draft_styrdokument, assess_change, gap_analysis, generate-law-list), tools/ (~50 files; createAgentTools factory; read tools + write tools that produce PendingAgentAction approval cards; role-filtered, AUDITOR read-only; every call logged to AgentDecisionLog)
libServices.chunks: lib/chunks — RAG ingestion: chunkDocument (3-tier: §-level / non-§ merge / markdown fallback w/ <60% coverage guard), generateContextPrefixes (Claude Haiku, max 100 chunks/request, Swedish 3-chars/token estimator), embed-chunks (OpenAI batches ≤100 with degradation ladder), syncDocumentChunks (atomic delete+insert, ≤50 rows/statement for Supavisor safety), ingest-extracted-file, workspace-document-reindex
libServices.search: lib/search — rerank.ts (Cohere v4, passthrough w/o key), match-candidates.ts (import fuzzy matching: doc-number + pg_trgm title similarity)
libServices.external: lib/external — elasticsearch.ts (searchDocuments, Swedish analyzer, PG fallback), riksdagen.ts (rate-limited 5/s), eurlex.ts (SPARQL/CELLAR), pdf-parser.ts (unpdf), llm-amendment-parser.ts (Claude PDF-direct vision)
libServices.sfs: lib/sfs — classify, sfs-amendment-crawler (svenskforfattningssamling.se, knownNumbers gap re-surfacing), pdf-fetcher → Supabase, amendment-to-legal-document, clean-law-html
libServices.agency: lib/agency — AFS scraper/transformer (cheerio on av.se), SKOLFS api/detector/events, agency-pdf-registry, regulatory-bodies (prefix→body map)
libServices.sync: lib/sync — change-detection (diff lib), version-archive, amendment-creator, ai-summary-queue (GPT-4 summaries)
libServices.legalDocument: lib/legal-document — version-reconstruction (law text at any date from LawSection + SectionChange), version-diff, version-cache
libServices.transforms: lib/transforms — CanonicalDocumentJson schema, canonical-html-parser (content-type-agnostic), html-to-markdown, normalizers per source
libServices.import: lib/import — parser (xlsx/csv/paste), matcher (LLM disambiguation), grouping-llm (Haiku clustering into subject areas)
libServices.complianceAudit: lib/compliance-audit — task-spawner (from AVVIKELSE findings), authorization, revisionsrapport-renderer → PDF, report-staleness
libServices.linkify: lib/linkify — detect + inject navigable cross-reference links in legal HTML; save-cross-references
libServices.usage: lib/usage — check (quota assert, 402), limits (tier SSOT), cost-estimator, seats/seat-cache, storage
libServices.billing_stripe_costs: lib/billing (trial lifecycle), lib/stripe (client, price IDs, customer), lib/costs (unit economics)
libServices.email: lib/email — Resend service (preference-aware, retry, four FROM addresses), unsubscribe HMAC tokens, cron notifications, ops digest
libServices.notifications: lib/notifications — amendment + task notifications, recipient resolution
libServices.auth: lib/auth — session, require-auth, permissions matrix, workspace-context (RBAC + billing gates)
libServices.supabase_files: lib/supabase (browser/server/admin-storage clients), lib/files/upload-core (mime allowlist, 25MB, dedupe, quota)
libServices.documents: lib/documents — Tiptap↔DOCX/HTML/PDF conversions, extract-file (PDF→Claude, DOCX→mammoth, XLS→SheetJS)
libServices.pdf: lib/pdf/render-html-to-pdf — puppeteer + chromium-min (FRAGILE prod stack, CHROMIUM_PACK_URL)
libServices.cache: lib/cache — Upstash redis (no-op fallback), server-cache (unstable_cache + tags), prewarm/warm-on-startup, invalidation
libServices.db: lib/db — connection-retry, optimized queries (law-list, workspace, dashboard, template-catalog)
libServices.employees_crypto: lib/employees (personnummer validation/masking, encrypted salary, repository), lib/crypto/field-encryption (AES-256-GCM), lib/integrations/fortnox (payload mapper)
libServices.bolagsapi_onboarding: lib/bolagsapi (company lookup), lib/company-preview (website analyzer via Claude), lib/onboarding (question selector, tier recommendation), lib/shared/regulatory-area-mapper
libServices.marketing_seo: lib/marketing (MDX loader, Zod frontmatter, glossary, catalog-link build-time resolver, metadata/JSON-LD), lib/seo/meta, lib/catalog/public-url (ContentType→URL, exhaustive-never)
libServices.admin: lib/admin — admin JWT auth (jose), job-registry, job-logger, health, template workflow
libServices.clientState: lib/stores (Zustand: workspace, document-list, task-list, layout, ui, breadcrumb), lib/hooks (~22 SWR/React hooks), lib/swr-keys, lib/prefetch
libServices.misc: lib/validation (Zod), lib/security/headers, lib/sentry, lib/consent, lib/activity + lib/services/activity-logger, lib/service-worker, lib/env (T3 typed env), lib/prisma (singleton, pgbouncer)

steps: 3. assertWithinTokenQuota (402 at 2× cap, warn header at 80%)
4. Load CompanyProfile (+Employee if HR context) → context blocks
7. Preallocate assistant ChatMessage stub (FK for mid-loop PendingAgentActions)
9. streamText: Claude Sonnet 4.6, stopWhen stepCountIs(10), adaptive thinking, 3 ephemeral cache breakpoints
aiChatPipeline.retrieval: AGENTIC — model calls search tools which run retrieveContext: OpenAI embed query → pgvector HNSW cosine (workspace-scoped, over-fetch 4×, ef_search=100, REPEALED excluded) → Cohere Rerank v4 → ranked chunks with citation keys. No pre-injected context block.
aiChatPipeline.writes: Human-in-the-loop: every mutating tool creates a PendingAgentAction approval card; nothing commits until user approves (actions/pending-agent-actions.ts). Drafts can open in the Tiptap editor (IN_EDITOR).
aiChatPipeline.citations: [Källa: …] markers → rehype-citation-pills → <cite> pills resolved via streamed citationSources metadata
aiChatPipeline.accounting: onFinish: fill stub, persist metadata, estimateCostUsd → ChatUsageEvent + WorkspaceUsage in one transaction (cache tokens discounted)

agentTools.registry: lib/agent/tools/index.ts — TOOL_REGISTRY_POLICY maps every tool to read|write tier. createAgentTools(workspaceId, userId, ctx, role, activeSkills) builds per-request. Filtering: role (AUDITOR read-only; employee tools permission-gated) → skill whitelist (ALWAYS_AVAILABLE ∪ active skills' whitelists; only save_assessment is skill-gated — new tools are always-available by default). Every call logged to AgentDecisionLog. Writes never execute directly — they create PendingAgentAction approval cards.

readAlwaysAvailable.search_laws: Semantic search over the whole legal corpus (RAG entry point); returns cited chunks
readAlwaysAvailable.search_workspace_files: Semantic search over the workspace's uploaded files
readAlwaysAvailable.search_collective_agreements: Semantic search over uploaded kollektivavtal (biases to employee's assigned agreement)
readAlwaysAvailable.search_workspace_documents: Semantic search over the workspace's styrdokument
readAlwaysAvailable.search_law_list_items: Find a law-list item by law name or SFS number
readAlwaysAvailable.read_file: Read an ENTIRE workspace file by fileId (not just excerpts)
readAlwaysAvailable.get_law_list_item: Item's compliance state: status, business context, narrative, status history, kravpunkter w/ evidence counts, assessments, links
readAlwaysAvailable.get_task: Task detail + truncated comments + handles to linked items/files/finding
readAlwaysAvailable.get_workspace_document: Full content + metadata of one styrdokument
readAlwaysAvailable.list_linked_artifacts: All files + styrdokument connected to a law-list item (direct, evidence, via tasks)
readAlwaysAvailable.list_cycles: Audit cycles overview (type, status, scope, progress, findings) — '0 cycles' is a key auditor answer
readAlwaysAvailable.get_cycle: One cycle's full state: progress, item rows with bedömning, findings, reports, linked tasks
readAlwaysAvailable.get_finding: One finding: type, severity, root cause, closure metadata, handles to cycle/item/kravpunkt/task
readAlwaysAvailable.list_bevis_gaps: Kravpunkter requiring evidence but missing it, workspace-wide
readAlwaysAvailable.list_unassessed_changes: Law changes on watched laws lacking an assessment (per change × list)
readAlwaysAvailable.get_document_details: Full legal-document detail by ID or document number
readAlwaysAvailable.get_change_details: Section-level old/new text for a change event
readAlwaysAvailable.suggest_followups: Follow-up question chips after a change assessment
readAlwaysAvailable.activate_skill: Load a different skill's instructions mid-conversation

readConditional.lookup_employee: GATE employees:view — find employee by name (case-insensitive substring)
readConditional.get_employee_salary: GATE employees:manage — one employee's compensation for kollektivavtal salary-compliance
readConditional.web_search: Route-injected, non-AUDITOR — Anthropic web search on Swedish legal domain whitelist

writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.create_task: New task (title, column, priority, due date, assignee)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.add_task_comment: Comment on a task (agent's assessment where assignee sees it)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.update_compliance_status: Change a law-list item's compliance status (transition logged)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.add_obligation: New kravpunkt on a watched law
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.update_requirement: Edit an existing kravpunkt (text, fulfilled, bevis_required, responsible)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.add_context_note: Business-context note on why a law is relevant
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.save_assessment: SKILL-GATED to assess_change — persist a ChangeAssessment (needs changeEventId)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.draft_styrdokument: Complete new governing document; can open IN_EDITOR before approval
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.update_document: Edit a section of an existing styrdokument and/or rename (Story 17.11)
writeToolsAllProduceApprovalCards.add_document_section: Insert a NEW section into an existing styrdokument (17.11b)

headlessOnly_generateLawListSkill.get_template_laws: Curated law recommendations for a regulatory area from expert templates (floor, not ceiling)
headlessOnly_generateLawListSkill.add_laws_to_list: Bulk-add laws to the law list with grouping + business context; dedupes; only real documentIds

sources.name: Svensk författningssamling
sources.provides: amendment/repeal index + PDFs (source of truth for amendments)

sources.name: EUR-Lex / Cellar
sources.provides: EU regulations (~60k) + directives (~4.7k) via SPARQL, CELEX, NIM

sources.name: BolagsAPI
sources.provides: company org-number lookup (onboarding, not legal corpus)

ingestionPipeline.sfsFlow: Riksdagen fetch → clean-law-html + sfs-law-normalizer → canonical-html-parser → JSON + markdown → linkify → LegalDocument + DocumentVersion + ChangeEvent (transaction) → chunk (§-level) → Haiku context prefix → OpenAI embed → content_chunks pgvector → Elasticsearch index
ingestionPipeline.amendmentFlow: discover-sfs-amendments cron (discovery only, incremental per index page) -> PENDING AmendmentDocument; process-sfs-amendments cron hourly (shared lib/sfs/amendment-processor, atomic PROCESSING claims, budget guard): PDF -> Claude Sonnet vision parse -> semantic HTML -> validate -> SectionChange rows + LegalDocument + deduped ChangeEvent -> prop context from Riksdagen. Classification: amendment/repeal/new via NAMED_LAW_SFS table ~90 laws; knownNumbers set re-surfaces gaps. sfs-pipeline-health cron (daily) watchdogs freshness vs the official register and sweeps zombie cron runs. Local drain: scripts/backfill-sfs-amendments.ts (safe sequential DB profile).
ingestionPipeline.workspaceFlow: Upload → lib/files/upload-core (Supabase) → extract-files cron (10min) → lib/documents/extract-file (PDF→Claude, DOCX→mammoth) → ingest-extracted-file → chunks (USER_FILE | COLLECTIVE_AGREEMENT) → embed. Styrdokument saves mark needs_reindex → sweep-draft-reindex cron (1min, 60s debounce).
ingestionPipeline.selfHealing: process-chunks cron hourly: docs with no/stale chunks or NULL embeddings get re-synced. Prefixes best-effort, embeddings GUARANTEED (past incident: 24K chunks of 76 laws invisible).
ingestionPipeline.esIndex: laglig_documents — separate from pgvector chunk store; title^3 document_number^2 multi_match, AUTO fuzziness, Swedish analyzer; bulkIndexDocuments + syncAllDocuments (cursor, batch 100)
guardrails: Supavisor fragility: chunk inserts ≤50 rows/statement; batch jobs must use connection_limit=1 and never the prod transaction pooler; wedge fix = dashboard project restart
Riksdagen rate limit 5 req/s 100/min with backoff; PDF fetcher 1/s; scrapers 200ms–1s between pages
Every cron: maxDuration 300, 30s timeout buffer, per-run caps, graceful early termination
workspace_id hard-required predicate on every workspace chunk write (cross-tenant defense)
ingestionPipeline.scriptsDir: scripts/ (~470 files): ingest-* (bulk SFS/EU/agency), sync-*, fetch-/crawl-*, backfill-* (18), amendment tooling, Anthropic Batch API pipeline (prepare/submit/process lagar batches), diagnostics (check-* ~107, verify-*, debug-*), seeds (seed-demo-workspace-*), capture-* (marketing screenshots), SQL index scripts. generate-embeddings.ts = 2-phase Haiku+OpenAI with Batch API 50%-off mode.

contentSystem.contract: Zod frontmatter (lib/marketing/frontmatter-schemas.ts): title, description ≤170, hero* fields, primaryCta, showOrgCheck, relatedCatalogLaws (build-time verified against LegalDocument via catalog-link.ts), relatedPages, faq min 3. Invalid frontmatter FAILS next build. Underscore-prefixed files never publish.
contentSystem.rendering: app/(marketing)/{kind}/[slug]/page.tsx → dynamic import of compiled MDX → {Topic|Feature|Industry}PageTemplate → BasePageTemplate fixed section order (hero → MDX article → conversion → CatalogLawList → optional ChangeFeed → FAQ → related → CTA). mdx-components.tsx maps typography + exposes bridge-row components (SplitFeature, ScreenshotFrame, FeatureGrid, ProofBlock, ProcessSteps...).

seo.sitemaps: scripts/generate-sitemaps.ts at postbuild → static XML in public/ (GSC rejected dynamic route). Chunked over ACTIVE LegalDocuments; chunk 0 carries marketing URLs. Daily refresh-sitemap cron → Deploy Hook. Build-time dead-link audit → .next/marketing-link-warnings.txt.
seo.robots: app/robots.ts — blocks AI-training crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, CCBot...), allows answer engines (Claude-SearchBot, PerplexityBot, ChatGPT-User)
seo.jsonLd: BreadcrumbList + FAQPage always; Article for funktioner/branscher; Legislation on law pages; DefinedTerm on ordbok; goal is GEO (answer-engine comprehension)

contentSystem.authoring: Use the content-page skill (Semrush research → typed frontmatter → legal-fact verification → SEO/GEO validation). Voice: 'beviset på plats' house forms; no stiff derived nouns; read aloud as HR user. Never reference Almåsa.

emails.stack: React Email templates in emails/ on shared laglig-email-layout (cream/ink tokens); sent via lib/email/email-service (Resend, preference-aware, retry)

environment.typed: lib/env.ts (@t3-oss/env-nextjs): DATABASE_URL, DIRECT_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, NEXTAUTH_SECRET/URL, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY/WEBHOOK_SECRET/PRICE_IDs, ADMIN_EMAILS/ADMIN_JWT_SECRET, BOLAGSAPI_API_KEY, SALES_NOTIFICATION_EMAIL; client: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL/ANON_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
environment.untyped: UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL/TOKEN, ELASTICSEARCH_URL/API_KEY, RESEND_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC key, COHERE_API_KEY, CHROMIUM_PACK_URL (prod scope!), PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH, ENCRYPTION_KEY (AES-256-GCM), CRON_SECRET, SENTRY_*, GA/Google Ads ids, FOUNDER_EMAIL, AI_CHAT_MODEL (anthropic|openai)

operationalNotes: Supabase migration/DDL hangs = leaked idle-in-transaction connections; terminate them; run via prisma migrate deploy, never the web editor. Migrations are applied MANUALLY by Alexander — hand over the command, never run them.
Prod ECHECKOUTTIMEOUT with idle DB = Supavisor transaction pool wedged; only fix is dashboard project restart. Batch jobs must not use the prod transaction pooler.
Ingestion safe profile: connection_limit=1, ≤50-row insert batches, breaker/watchdog.
PDF export stack is fragile: node-linker=hoisted + chromium-min + CHROMIUM_PACK_URL (prod env scope). react-pdf is the considered replacement.
'draft_styrdokument failed' may be an HTTP 402 quota cap — check WorkspaceUsage.tokens_used_this_period first.
DocumentListTable (Laglistor) is the canonical table pattern — do not migrate to shadcn.
legal_documents.embedding column exists but semantic search runs via ContentChunk only.

Cron hard-kills at maxDuration leave silent RUNNING zombies in CronJobRun (no failure email). Known: discover-sfs-amendments hard-killed every run since 2026-06-17 → stale amendments. Check /admin/cron-jobs for zombies.
docsOrganization: docs/ is a BMad-method knowledge base: architecture/ (sharded, ~50 files), prd/ (~37), stories/ (~31), epics/, briefs/, marketing/, seo/, reference/ (data model, ERD, APIs), performance/, feature-specifications/, components/, ux/, qa/, setup/, legal/, plans/. Monoliths: prd.md, architecture.md (441KB), brief.md, front-end-spec.md.
